name: EthReceivePacket
title: EthReceivePacket
description: Use this function to register a CAPL callback function to receive Ethernet packets. The callback has a packet handle as parameter and the functions to access the tokens can be used. The EthGetThis-functions can be used to access the payload of the highest interpretable protocol.
The callback must have the following signature:

The difference to EthReceiveRawPacket is, that the callback function gets a packet handle as parameter and the EthGetThis-Functions access the payload of the highest protocol instead the raw Ethernet data.
